data.name: InvokeRawCommand.parameters.Command
data.value: Specifies the native command to execute.

data.name: InvokeRawCommand.parameters.Arguments
data.value: Provides additional arguments for the command.

data.name: InvokeRawCommand.parameters.InputBytes
data.value: Sends raw input bytes from the pipeline to the command.

data.name: InvokeRawCommand.parameters.Output
data.value: Selects which output stream to capture (stdout or stderr).

data.name: InvokeRawCommand.parameters.AsString
data.value: Returns the output as a UTF-8 string.

data.name: InvokeRawCommand.parameters.Encoding
data.value: Specifies the encoding used for input and output strings.

data.name: ConvertFromRawString.parameters.InputString
data.value: Converts the input string to a byte array using the specified encoding.

data.name: ConvertFromRawString.parameters.Encoding
data.value: Specifies the encoding used to convert the string to bytes.

data.name: ConvertFromRawString.parameters.Delimiter
data.value: Adds a delimiter before each input string when multiple values are provided.
